tasks.label: setup-backend-venv
tasks.command: rm -rf '${workspaceFolder}/backend/.venv' '${workspaceFolder}/backend/.venv.nosync' && python3 -m venv '${workspaceFolder}/backend/.venv.nosync' && ln -s '${workspaceFolder}/backend/.venv.nosync' '${workspaceFolder}/backend/.venv' && '${workspaceFolder}/backend/.venv.nosync/bin/pip' install --upgrade pip -q && '${workspaceFolder}/backend/.venv.nosync/bin/pip' install -r '${workspaceFolder}/backend/src/requirements.txt'

tasks.label: setup-frontend-node
tasks.command: cd '${workspaceFolder}/frontend' && rm -rf node_modules node_modules.nosync && npm install && mv node_modules node_modules.nosync && ln -s node_modules.nosync node_modules

tasks.label: Docker Compose Up (Build)
tasks.command: docker compose up --build; docker compose down -v
